stemHtml: Two positions at the same latitude are marked on an aeronautical chart and the meridians at those positions converge with an angle of 30°. The effect of this convergence is that the true track of…

options.a: rhumb line route between both positions will be either 090º (T) or 270º (T).
options.b: the rhumb line and great circle route between those two positions will differ by 30° at either position.
options.c: the great circle route between those two positions will change by 30°.
options.d: the rhumb line route between those two positions will change by 30°.
